title: Yosys is unable to prove logical equivalence when _DFFE_PP_ cells are duplicated

features.name: dffe_pp cell duplication via techmap
features.description: Code should include a techmap that replaces a single _DFFE_PP_ cell with two _DFFE_PP_ cells in series, creating a two-stage sequential pipeline

features.name: chained dffe_pp cells with shared clock and enable
features.description: Code should include two _DFFE_PP_ cells where the output of the first feeds into the D input of the second, with both sharing the same clock (C) and enable (E) signals

features.name: techmap module replacement of sequential cell
features.description: Code should include a techmap module that replaces an internal cell type (backslash-prefixed name like \$_DFFE_PP_) with a library cell (_DFFE_PP_) via _TECHMAP_REPLACE_
